testcase.name: Full System Integrity
testcase.failure:
Command failed: node tests/full_system_test.js
❌ E2E TEST FAILED: TypeError: fetch failed
testcase.system-out: 🏁 STARTING END-TO-END SYSTEM TEST... 1️⃣ Creating test post...

testcase.name: Admin Health & Schema
testcase.failure:
Command failed: node tests/admin_health.js
❌ ADMIN VERIFICATION FAILED: Missing 'system-global-state'. Did you run DEPLOY_V1.3.sql?

testcase.name: User Flow Validation
testcase.failure:
Command failed: node tests/user_flow_validation.js
❌ VALIDATION FAILED: Contact Form Failed: TypeError: fetch failed
testcase.system-out:
🏁 STARTING FULL USER-FLOW VALIDATION...
📩 Testing Contact Form Submission...

testcase.name: Authentication Logic
testcase.system-out:
🧪 STARTING AUTH FLOW UNIT TESTS... Test 1: Logout Behavior... ✅ PASSED Test 2: Valid Token Check... ✅ PASSED Test 3: Expired Token Check... ✅ PASSED Test 4: Bypass Token Check... ✅ PASSED
🎉 ALL AUTH TESTS PASSED.

testcase.name: Post Management Logic
testcase.system-out: TEST: Create Post [MOCK] Insert into posts: [ { title: 'Test Title', content: 'Test Content', slug: 'test-title', tags: [ 'tag1', 'tag2' ], image_url: '', published: true, updated_at: '2026-03-08T15:56:12.149Z' } ] [MOCK] Reset Form [MOCK] Fetch Posts ✅ Create Post Passed TEST: Update Post [MOCK] Update posts where id=123: { title: 'Updated Title', content: 'Test Content', slug: 'updated-title', tags: [ 'tag1', 'tag2' ], image_url: '', published: true, updated_at: '2026-03-08T15:56:12.151Z' } [MOCK] Reset Form [MOCK] Fetch Posts ✅ Update Post Passed ALL TESTS PASSED

testcase.name: Email Link Logic
testcase.system-out: TEST: Email Link Formatting Generated Link: mailto:test@example.com?subject=Inquiry Reply: Only True Perspective // John Doe&body=Hello there! ✅ Email Link Formatting Passed

testcase.name: Theme Logic
testcase.system-out: Running Theme Toggle Tests... PASS: Initial theme is dark (no attribute) PASS: Toggled to light mode PASS: LocalStorage updated to 'light' PASS: Toggled back to dark mode PASS: LocalStorage updated to 'dark' PASS: Local user preference overrides remote state Theme tests complete.

testcase.name: Menu Logic
testcase.system-out: Running Menu Logic Tests... PASS: Drawer has 'open' class after click. PASS: aria-expanded is 'true' (string). PASS: Drawer removed 'open' class after second click. PASS: aria-expanded is 'false' (string).

testcase.name: Security & Performance
testcase.system-out:
🛡️ STARTING SECURITY & PERFORMANCE AUDIT...
⏱️ Performance: - Initial Response Latency: 62ms ✅ PASS: Low latency (<200ms)
🛡️ Security Headers: ✅ content-security-policy: PRESENT ✅ x-frame-options: PRESENT ✅ x-content-type-options: PRESENT ✅ strict-transport-security: PRESENT ✅ referrer-policy: PRESENT
📦 Optimization: ✅ Compression: ENABLED (br)
